purpose: Defines the on-disk JSON shape used by a future file-based correction queue. The queue is a simple directory tree under an internal docs path; no database is implied. Read by reviewers via a CLI; never imported by app routes.

subdirectories.inbox: Newly received items pending triage. Status RECEIVED.
subdirectories.in_review: Items under reviewer triage / source recheck.
subdirectories.decided: Items where a correction decision has been recorded.
subdirectories.staged_corrections: Items whose decision has produced a staged runtime update (still NOT live).
subdirectories.closed: Items resolved (NO_CHANGE, applied, withdrawn, rejected as spam).

filename_convention: <correction_id>.json — UUIDv4 hex without dashes; lowercase. e.g. 8f2a3b71b9c84e2da5e09a4d2f3a4c1d.json

status.notes: Mirror status values in correction_intake_backsite_spec_2_queue_statuses.csv. Forbidden_status_tokens (PUBLIC_NOW / IMPORT_READY) are never valid.

listing_id.notes: Empty allowed only for pilot-feedback ref. Server-resolved against runtime maps before write.

report_ref.notes: Mirror enum from intake payload schema.

issue_type.notes: Mirror enum from intake payload schema.

user_message_redacted.notes: Server applies redaction pass before write: SSN-shaped strings, credit-card-shaped strings, passport-shaped strings, full email addresses other than user_email field replaced with [redacted]. Original is never persisted.

source_context.notes: Snapshot of the source_context provided by the user, intersected with the server-resolved runtime card source data.

evidence_join_key.notes: Equal to listing_id by convention. Used to look up evidence rows in the staged-runtime evidence join map.

review_due_date.notes: Set on TRIAGED status based on priority.

forbidden_fields_in_queue_item: Mirror the intake payload schema's forbidden_fields list. Any present field of these names causes the write to be rejected and the inbound payload to be discarded.

allowed_state_transitions: RECEIVED -> CLOSED (forbidden field present at intake; written-out only as a counter, never as content)
forbidden_transitions: Any transition that skips SOURCE_RECHECK_PENDING when the priority is P0 or P1

concurrency_spec.write_lock: Per-file lock at write time using `<file>.lock` sentinel. CLI tools must acquire-then-release.
concurrency_spec.read_safety: Reads always full-file; partial reads forbidden.
